product-photo.name: Product Photography
product-photo.description: Professional product shots suitable for e-commerce and catalogs
product-photo.modifiers: professional product photography, white background, soft studio lighting, high detail, commercial quality, centered composition, subtle shadow, crisp focus on product, 8K resolution
example_prompts: Red sneakers on white background
Wireless headphones floating at angle
Skincare bottle with water droplets
Watch on marble surface with soft lighting
product-photo.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted, watermark, text overlay, cluttered background

product-lifestyle.name: Product Lifestyle Shot
product-lifestyle.description: Products shown in natural use contexts
product-lifestyle.modifiers: lifestyle product photography, natural environment, in-use context, warm ambient lighting, depth of field, authentic setting, candid feel, editorial quality
example_prompts: Coffee mug on a wooden desk with morning light
Backpack on a hiking trail at sunset
Laptop in a cozy cafe setting
product-lifestyle.negative_prompt: studio lighting, white background, artificial, posed, stock photo feel

logo-design.name: Logo Design
logo-design.description: Clean, minimal logo concepts for branding
logo-design.modifiers: minimal logo design, vector style, clean lines, scalable, professional branding, negative space, centered on white background, flat design, single or two color palette, geometric precision
example_prompts: Mountain and sunrise logo for outdoor brand
Abstract letter M logo for tech company
Leaf and coffee cup logo for organic cafe
Geometric fox logo for creative agency
logo-design.negative_prompt: 3D, gradient, photorealistic, detailed illustration, complex, busy, many colors

social-media.name: Social Media Graphics
social-media.description: Eye-catching visuals for Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn
social-media.modifiers: eye-catching social media graphic, vibrant colors, bold composition, suitable for Instagram/Twitter, modern design, engaging visual, clean layout with text space
example_prompts: Motivational quote background with abstract gradients
Product announcement visual with bold typography space
Seasonal sale graphic with festive elements
Event promotion visual with dynamic shapes
social-media.negative_prompt: text, words, letters, low resolution, pixelated

social-media-story.name: Social Media Story
social-media-story.modifiers: vertical story format, 9:16 aspect ratio, mobile-optimized, bold visuals, text overlay space at center, gradient background, modern aesthetic
example_prompts: Behind-the-scenes style background for story
Countdown announcement background
Poll/question background with split design
social-media-story.negative_prompt: landscape orientation, small details, complex scenes

illustration.name: Digital Illustration
illustration.description: Professional digital artwork for various purposes
illustration.modifiers: digital illustration, detailed artwork, professional quality, clean lines, vivid colors, well-defined shapes, balanced composition, artstation quality
example_prompts: Futuristic cityscape at night with neon lights
Fantasy forest with glowing mushrooms
Children's book style village scene
illustration.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, blurry, low quality, amateur

portrait.name: Portrait Photography
portrait.description: Professional portrait and headshot style images
portrait.modifiers: professional portrait photography, shallow depth of field, natural lighting, high detail, 85mm lens look, soft bokeh background, flattering light, sharp focus on eyes
example_prompts: Professional headshot with neutral background
Environmental portrait of an artist in studio
Natural light portrait near a window
portrait.negative_prompt: distorted face, extra fingers, deformed, ugly, blurry

landscape.name: Landscape Photography
landscape.description: Breathtaking natural and urban landscape scenes
landscape.modifiers: breathtaking landscape photography, golden hour lighting, wide angle, high dynamic range, vivid natural colors, dramatic sky, sharp throughout, National Geographic quality
example_prompts: Mountain range reflected in crystal clear lake at sunrise
Rolling lavender fields in Provence at golden hour
Desert sand dunes under Milky Way sky
landscape.negative_prompt: indoor, close-up, portrait, artificial lighting, cluttered

infographic.name: Infographic Design
infographic.modifiers: clean infographic design, data visualization, flat design, organized layout, professional color palette, clear hierarchy, icons and symbols, grid-aligned, modern typography space
example_prompts: Process flow infographic with 5 steps
Comparison infographic template two columns
Statistics dashboard layout with chart placeholders

icon-set.name: Icon Set Design
icon-set.description: Consistent icon sets for apps and websites
icon-set.modifiers: consistent icon design, flat style, uniform stroke width, cohesive color palette, 64x64 grid aligned, pixel perfect, minimal detail, recognizable silhouettes
example_prompts: Set of 9 business icons in blue line style
Food and drink icon set in flat pastel colors
Travel and transportation icon grid
icon-set.negative_prompt: 3D, gradient, realistic, detailed, shadowed, inconsistent style

mockup.name: Product Mockup
mockup.modifiers: professional product mockup, realistic perspective, clean environment, branded presentation, subtle shadows, photorealistic rendering, premium feel
example_prompts: iPhone showing app interface on wooden desk
T-shirt mockup on invisible mannequin
Business card mockup on concrete surface
Packaging box mockup with brand space

banner.name: Banner / Hero Image
banner.description: Wide banners for websites, emails, and ads
banner.modifiers: wide banner design, hero image, bold composition, text space on left or right third, 16:9 aspect ratio, impactful visual, professional quality, clean negative space for typography
example_prompts: Tech conference banner with abstract circuit patterns
E-commerce sale banner with dynamic shapes
SaaS landing page hero with gradient abstract
banner.negative_prompt: text, words, letters, portrait orientation, cluttered

anime.name: Anime / Manga Style
anime.description: Japanese animation and manga aesthetic artwork
anime.modifiers: anime illustration style, Japanese animation aesthetic, detailed character design, vibrant colors, clean line art, expressive eyes, dynamic pose, studio quality, light novel cover quality
example_prompts: Anime girl with blue hair in school uniform
Cyberpunk samurai character concept
Fantasy adventurer party group shot
Slice of life cafe scene illustration
anime.negative_prompt: western style, realistic, 3D render, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs

watercolor.name: Watercolor Style
watercolor.modifiers: watercolor painting style, soft edges, natural color blending, artistic brushstrokes, paper texture visible, paint bleeding effects, delicate washes, traditional media feel
example_prompts: Watercolor flowers bouquet on white paper
Watercolor landscape of a French village
Watercolor portrait with loose brushwork
watercolor.negative_prompt: digital art, sharp edges, photorealistic, vector, flat colors

oil-painting.name: Oil Painting Style
oil-painting.modifiers: oil painting style, thick brushstrokes, rich colors, canvas texture, impasto technique, classical composition, museum quality, warm palette, dramatic lighting
example_prompts: Still life with fruits and wine in classical style
Impressionist garden scene with dappled light
Portrait in Rembrandt lighting style

3d-render.name: 3D Render
3d-render.modifiers: 3D rendered scene, realistic materials, professional lighting, octane render quality, ray tracing, ambient occlusion, subsurface scattering, physically based rendering
example_prompts: 3D render of a cozy room interior with warm lighting
Abstract 3D shapes floating on gradient background
3D product visualization of futuristic gadget
3d-render.negative_prompt: 2D, flat, illustration, cartoon, low poly, wireframe

pixel-art.name: Pixel Art
pixel-art.modifiers: pixel art style, retro gaming aesthetic, limited color palette (16-32 colors), clean pixel placement, crisp edges, no anti-aliasing, 8-bit or 16-bit era feel
example_prompts: Pixel art fantasy castle on a hill
16-bit RPG character sprite sheet
Pixel art sunset cityscape scene
pixel-art.negative_prompt: high resolution, photorealistic, smooth gradients, anti-aliased, modern

vintage.name: Vintage / Retro
vintage.description: Nostalgic film photography and retro aesthetics
vintage.modifiers: vintage photograph style, film grain, muted colors, nostalgic atmosphere, 1970s aesthetic, slight vignette, warm color shift, analog feel, Kodak Portra 400 look
example_prompts: Vintage cafe interior with film grain
1970s road trip van on desert highway
Polaroid style beach scene at sunset
vintage.negative_prompt: modern, digital, sharp, clean, HDR, oversaturated

minimalist.name: Minimalist Design
minimalist.description: Clean, minimal compositions with negative space
minimalist.modifiers: minimalist design, clean composition, generous negative space, limited color palette (2-3 colors), modern aesthetic, geometric simplicity, refined details, elegant restraint
example_prompts: Single flower in a minimal vase on white
Geometric abstract shapes in earth tones
Minimal architecture with strong shadows
minimalist.negative_prompt: busy, cluttered, detailed, complex, many colors, ornate

isometric.name: Isometric Illustration
isometric.description: Isometric 3D illustrations for tech and business
isometric.modifiers: isometric 3D illustration, clean geometric shapes, flat shading, technical precision, 30-degree angle, consistent scale, vibrant yet professional color palette, no perspective distortion
example_prompts: Isometric office workspace with desk and computer
Isometric city block with buildings and streets
Isometric data center server room

food.name: Food Photography
food.modifiers: professional food photography, appetizing presentation, shallow depth of field, warm lighting, overhead or 45-degree angle, styled with props, mouth-watering detail, restaurant menu quality
example_prompts: Artisan pizza on wooden board overhead shot
Colorful poke bowl with chopsticks
Stack of fluffy pancakes with berries and syrup
Japanese ramen bowl with steam rising
food.negative_prompt: unappetizing, cold lighting, messy, dirty dishes, low quality

architecture.name: Architectural Photography
architecture.modifiers: architectural photography, clean lines, dramatic perspective, professional quality, wide angle, straight verticals, natural lighting, interior or exterior, modern design magazine quality
example_prompts: Modern glass building reflecting sunset
Minimalist white interior with natural light
Spiral staircase from above with geometric pattern
architecture.negative_prompt: distorted, tilted, blurry, HDR overdone, people

fashion.name: Fashion Photography
fashion.description: High fashion editorial and lookbook style
fashion.modifiers: high fashion photography, editorial style, dramatic lighting, professional model pose, studio or location, Vogue quality, bold styling, strong composition, designer aesthetic
example_prompts: Fashion editorial with geometric shadows
Street style photography in urban setting
Luxury accessories flat lay on marble
fashion.negative_prompt: amateur, snapshot, casual, unflattering angles, poor lighting

flat-lay.name: Flat Lay
flat-lay.description: Overhead flat lay compositions for social media and e-commerce
flat-lay.modifiers: professional flat lay photography, overhead bird's eye view, organized composition, complementary props, soft even lighting, clean background, styled arrangement, Instagram-worthy
example_prompts: Travel essentials flat lay with passport and camera
Desk accessories flat lay on white marble
Skincare routine flat lay with plants

texture.name: Texture / Pattern
texture.description: Seamless textures and patterns for design use
texture.modifiers: seamless tileable texture, high resolution, consistent lighting, no visible seams, photographic quality, even distribution, suitable for 3D material or background use
example_prompts: Seamless white marble texture with gold veins
Weathered wood planks texture seamless
Abstract geometric pattern in navy and gold
texture.negative_prompt: objects, scenes, people, uneven, non-tileable, perspective

sticker.name: Sticker / Emoji Design
sticker.description: Cute sticker and emoji designs for apps and messaging
sticker.modifiers: cute sticker design, die-cut style, white border outline, kawaii aesthetic, simple clean lines, bright cheerful colors, transparent background, expressive, chibi proportions
example_prompts: Cute cat sticker with heart eyes
Happy coffee cup sticker character
Set of emoji-style weather stickers
sticker.negative_prompt: realistic, photographic, complex background, detailed, dark

cyberpunk.name: Cyberpunk / Sci-Fi
cyberpunk.description: Futuristic cyberpunk and science fiction aesthetics
cyberpunk.modifiers: cyberpunk aesthetic, neon lights, futuristic technology, dark moody atmosphere, rain-slicked streets, holographic elements, blade runner inspired, high contrast, electric blue and magenta color palette
example_prompts: Cyberpunk city street at night with neon signs
Futuristic hacker workspace with holographic screens
Sci-fi spaceship interior corridor
cyberpunk.negative_prompt: daytime, natural, rural, historical, simple, minimalist

fantasy.name: Fantasy Art
fantasy.description: Epic fantasy illustrations and concept art
fantasy.modifiers: epic fantasy art, detailed environment, dramatic lighting, magical atmosphere, concept art quality, rich color palette, painterly technique, world-building detail, D&D/LOTR inspired quality
example_prompts: Ancient dragon perched on a crystal mountain
Enchanted forest with glowing fairy lights
Wizard tower at twilight with aurora borealis
fantasy.negative_prompt: modern, urban, photorealistic, minimalist, cartoon, childish

children-book.name: Children's Book Illustration
children-book.description: Warm, friendly illustrations suitable for children's books
children-book.modifiers: children's book illustration, warm friendly style, soft colors, gentle lighting, storybook aesthetic, whimsical characters, rounded shapes, cozy atmosphere, suitable for ages 3-8
example_prompts: Bunny family having tea in a mushroom house
Little bear exploring a magical garden
Child riding a friendly dragon through clouds
children-book.negative_prompt: scary, dark, violent, realistic, photographic, mature themes

technical-diagram.name: Technical Diagram
technical-diagram.description: Clean technical diagrams and system architecture visuals
technical-diagram.modifiers: clean technical diagram, system architecture visualization, organized layout, clear connections and arrows, professional color coding, labeled components, white background, engineering precision
example_prompts: Cloud architecture diagram with AWS-style icons
Network topology diagram with labeled nodes
Software development pipeline flowchart

presentation-slide.name: Presentation Slide Background
presentation-slide.description: Professional backgrounds for keynote and PowerPoint slides
presentation-slide.modifiers: professional presentation slide background, clean design, subtle gradient or pattern, corporate quality, large text area, non-distracting, modern aesthetic, 16:9 widescreen format
example_prompts: Abstract blue gradient slide background with geometric shapes
Dark theme slide background with subtle circuit pattern
Clean white slide background with minimal accent lines
presentation-slide.negative_prompt: busy, detailed, text, cluttered, portrait orientation, photos

meme.name: Meme Template
meme.description: Internet meme style images for humor and engagement
meme.modifiers: meme template style, bold visual, exaggerated expression or situation, clear composition, space for top and bottom text, relatable scenario, internet humor aesthetic
example_prompts: Surprised cat looking at laptop screen
Person making difficult choice between two buttons
Dog sitting at desk pretending to work
meme.negative_prompt: text, words, letters, captions, watermark, high art

album-cover.name: Album Cover Art
album-cover.description: Music album and single cover art designs
album-cover.modifiers: music album cover art, artistic composition, bold visual impact, suitable for square format, genre-appropriate mood, memorable design, record label quality, strong color palette
example_prompts: Lo-fi hip hop album cover with rainy window scene
Electronic music album with abstract neon geometry
Jazz album cover with smoky club atmosphere
album-cover.negative_prompt: text, words, band name, song title, plain, boring

avatar.name: Profile Avatar
avatar.description: Profile pictures and avatar designs for social media
avatar.modifiers: profile avatar design, centered face or icon, circular crop friendly, clear at small sizes, distinctive and memorable, clean background, works at 128x128 and up
example_prompts: Stylized fox avatar with geometric shapes
Professional illustrated portrait for LinkedIn
Cute animal avatar in pastel colors
avatar.negative_prompt: full body, landscape, wide shot, complex background, tiny details

real-estate.name: Real Estate Photography
real-estate.description: Professional real estate and property photography
real-estate.modifiers: professional real estate photography, wide angle interior, HDR balanced exposure, bright and airy, straight verticals, welcoming atmosphere, magazine quality, natural daylight enhanced
example_prompts: Modern living room with floor-to-ceiling windows
Luxury kitchen with marble island and pendant lights
Backyard patio with pool at golden hour
real-estate.negative_prompt: dark, cluttered, messy, people, personal items, dated

template_combinations.description: Pre-defined template combinations for common use cases

global_negative_prompt: nsfw, nude, violence, gore, offensive, copyright characters, branded logos, watermark, signature, low quality, blurry, distorted, deformed
